_comment: PINNED launch descriptor for the reproducible SEV-SNP launch measurement. Unlike an abstract input file, this ties the measurement to the ACTUAL guest the CVM boots: the reproducible OVMF firmware (deploy/guest/ovmf.pin.json) plus the UKI produced by deploy/guest/mkosi.conf. Copy to snp-inputs.json, point every path at the EXACT built artifacts, fill each expected_artifacts.sha384_hex, then run: cargo run -p xtask -- snp-measure --inputs snp-inputs.json --image-manifest image-manifest.json --log transparency.log. xtask recomputes each artifact's SHA-384, refuses on any mismatch with the pinned value (and with image-manifest.json where they overlap), records the source git commit, and emits a commit-bound snp-reference.json. The append string MUST be byte-identical to the UKI's baked-in cmdline (deploy/guest/mkosi.conf KernelCommandLine) and to what the launcher boots with (kernel-hashes=on).
